title: Junior Business Development Manager at Gaurs Group

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Gaurs Group
jsonLd.description:
Gaurs Group has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Howrah office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Gaurs Group:
Gaurs Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gaurs Group!
